name: BOMB💣SHELL
description:
For some reason, your algorithm brought a really weird post to your feed today. A blurry picture which made it really hard to tell what it was trying to show, accompained by a text announcing some kinda "fan meetup". But the account that made the post only got 1 single follower. The person behind it is either a bot or really delusional.

It did mention something about twerking though...

Walking down the street towards who knows where, you begin hearing a loud sound near where you are. Blows, or rather... smacks? Like someone getting slapped on the face repeatedly, just... different. Like the face getting slapped is actually very thick and cheeky...

When I made the character collage, quite a few people was particularly interested in the Bomb Gal. Count me there too cause you know I love this artist (except when he draws farts or other shit).

I wasn't really inspired when thinking about a scenario for this gal so the initial message may result a bit bland. It's hard to bring up a scenario for a character with 0 background and context. And the fact her name is literally "bomb gal" doesnt help either.

Art and character by Androjuniarto

> UNCENSORED IMAGE GALLERY <

Same bot on Saucepan
creator: forcedattrition
